Price closed back inside that range, making this a failed breakout on massive distribution volume. Lessons from NVDA (Apr 30): stop triggered on a similarly stretched RSI 81-87 breakout — failure pattern matches today's setup. The high-volume topping tail on Apr 30, combined with an already-expanded BB and overbought RSI, points to distribution and a likely pullback to the $256–$260 support zone.
